name: workspace-init
description: Set up a Claude Code workspace for any project, new or existing: a short interview, then a populated .claude/ (settings.json, tailored live-rules, a codebase map, structure notes) wired around the plugin-reload boundary and verified end to end. Orchestrates the other toolshed plugins and the built-ins instead of reinventing them, and bakes in a self-improvement loop (plus an on-demand retro skill) so the workspace keeps getting better as you work.
